creator: tomasz.owczarek@proton.me
text:
py-matrix-synapse version 112.0 is security release is to update locked dependency on Twisted to 24.7.0rc1, which includes a security fix for CVE-2024-41671 / GHSA-c8m8-j448-xjx7: Disordered HTTP pipeline response in twisted.web, again.

source:
https://github.com/element-hq/synapse/releases/tag/v1.112.0
